Appearances:
Plaintiff Fred Levinson Trustee of the Levinson Family Trust is present. Represented by Mark Levinson.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Kezia Pearlman is present.
Attorney Josh Schreiber representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of JAN-28-2013 remains on calendar.
